title: Documentation Event Extraction Pipeline
description: CLI tool that scans JS source files for svc_event.emit() calls, extracts event definitions with typed properties, applies manual overrides, and optionally generates test extension files.
activity_flow: main(): Parse process.argv (directory, outputFile, generateTest, testOutputDir, debugMode)
Load manualOverrides from manual_overrides.json.js → build manualOverridesMap (Map<id, override>)
Seed seenEvents: iterate manualOverrides → set each override.fromManualOverride=true, seenEvents.set(id, override)
[DECISION] entry is directory? → recursive scanDirectory(subdir, seenEvents, debugMode)
[DECISION] entry ends with '.js'? → extractEventsFromFile(filePath, seenEvents, debugMode)
YES + fromManualOverride → push 'Using manual override' warning, return true
YES (duplicate) → push 'Duplicate event' warning, return true
YES → apply override (set fromManualOverride=true), seenEvents.set(id, override), continue
generateDescription(eventName) → description string (keyed on action keywords: create/update/delete/progress/validate)
YES (inline object) → regex extract propertiesText from { } → extractProperties(...)
NO (variable ref) → regex search content for 'const|let|var varName = {...}' → extractProperties(...)
Glue lines, split by commas, extract first token (property name)
forEach prop → propertyDetails[prop] = { type: guessType(prop), mutability: hasAllowEffect?'effect':'no-effect', summary: guessSummary(prop, eventName) }
seenEvents.set(eventId, { id, event, filename, description, properties, fromManualOverride:false })
[CATCH] error → push warning 'Error processing file: message'
Post-scan: check unused manual overrides → forEach manualOverride: if event not found or not fromManualOverride → push warning
YES → generateTestExtension(result) → JS code string with extension.on() listeners per event
Create testOutputDir if not exists (mkdirSync recursive)
Process warnings: partition into duplicateEvents, overrideEvents, otherWarnings
[DECISION] warnings.length > 0? → print duplicate events list, override events list, other warnings
key_functions: main() — CLI arg parsing, orchestration, output writing, warning reporting
scanDirectory(directory, seenEvents, debugMode) — recursive FS traversal, delegates .js files to extractEventsFromFile
extractEventsFromFile(filePath, seenEvents, debugMode) — regex-based event extraction, duplicate/override checks, property extraction
checkForDuplicateEvent(eventId, filePath, seenEvents) — dedup guard, pushes warnings, returns boolean
extractProperties(propertiesText, propertyDetails, hasAllowEffect, eventName) — tokenises property names, calls guessType + guessSummary
generateDescription(eventName) — derives description from dot-split action keywords (create/update/delete/progress/validate)
guessType(propertyName) — maps prop name patterns to types (FSNodeContext, Context, User, string, number, boolean, object, Policy, ProgressTracker, any)
guessSummary(propertyName, eventName) — maps prop name patterns to human-readable summaries
generateTestExtension(events) — emits extension.on() stubs for each event
formatEventsOutput(events) — serialises event map to events.json.js export format (handles manual overrides vs auto-generated separately)
key_decisions: Duplicate event? → skip, warn (override takes priority over source file)
Manual override exists for eventId? → use override, skip auto-generation
eventArg inline object vs variable reference → two regex strategies for property extraction
outputFile provided? → write to file, else stdout
warnings accumulated? → print categorised summary at end

data_structures.seenEvents: Map<eventId:string, EventDef> — central registry, seeded with manual overrides then augmented by scan
data_structures.EventDef: { id, event, filename, description, properties: { [name]: { type, mutability, summary, notes? } }, fromManualOverride }
data_structures.manualOverridesMap: Map<id, override> — fast lookup for manual override entries
data_structures.warnings: string[] — global array collecting dedup/error/override warnings throughout run

external_dependencies: fs (readFileSync, readdirSync, statSync, writeFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync)
manual_overrides.json.js — static JSON import of curated event overrides
important_notes: ES module (import/export). Global `warnings` array is side-effected throughout. Manual overrides always win over auto-extraction. scanDirectory is fully recursive. generateTestExtension is only triggered by --generate-test CLI flag. formatEventsOutput outputs JS (not JSON) — export default [...] format.
